source: National Council of the Slovak Republic (NRSR)
description: Information on the asset declarations of public officials in Slovakia, including their income, real estate, movable assets, and property rights.
related_legislation: Constitutional Law No. 357/2004 Coll. on the Protection of Public Interest in the Performance of Functions of Public Officials
notes_limitations: Self-reported data by public officials. Some variations in spelling or formatting might exist.

variables.name: nrsr_name
variables.description: Name as registered in the parliament records

variables.name: declarations
variables.description: List of all declarations submitted by the official
variables.notes_limitations: Contains one or more declaration objects

variables.name: declarations.declaration_id
variables.description: Unique identifier for the specific declaration

variables.name: declarations.report_date
variables.notes_limitations: YYYY-MM-DD format. Can be null if reported_on_start is true.

variables.name: declarations.reported_on_start
variables.description: Indicates if the declaration was submitted upon taking office

variables.name: declarations.public_function
variables.description: The public function(s) held by the official
variables.notes_limitations: May contain multiple records separated by newline

variables.name: declarations.income_function
variables.description: Income derived from the public function in EUR
variables.notes_limitations: Amounts for declarations from 2008 and earlier, originally reported in Slovak crowns (SKK), were converted to euros (EUR) using the fixed official conversion rate of 1 EUR = 30.1260 SKK and rounded to two decimal places (eurocents).

variables.name: declarations.income_other
variables.description: Other income derived from outside the public function in EUR
variables.notes_limitations: Amounts for declarations from 2008 and earlier, originally reported in Slovak crowns (SKK), were converted to euros (EUR) using the fixed official conversion rate of 1 EUR = 30.1260 SKK and rounded to two decimal places (eurocents).

variables.name: declarations.function_condition
variables.description: Whether the official meets the legal conditions to perform their function

variables.name: declarations.employee
variables.description: Details about any other employment the official holds
variables.notes_limitations: May contain multiple records separated by a newline

variables.name: declarations.business
variables.description: Details of any business activities or enterprise ownership
variables.notes_limitations: May contain multiple records separated by a newline

variables.name: declarations.other_functions
variables.description: Other functions held in state bodies, territorial self-government bodies, or legal entities
variables.notes_limitations: May contain multiple records separated by a newline

variables.name: declarations.real_estates
variables.description: List of real estate properties owned, including location and ownership share
variables.notes_limitations: May contain multiple records separated by a newline

variables.name: declarations.movable
variables.description: List of movable assets owned, including vehicles and valuables
variables.notes_limitations: May contain multiple records separated by a newline

variables.name: declarations.property_rights
variables.description: List of property rights and other asset values (e.g., shares, securities)
variables.notes_limitations: May contain multiple records separated by a newline

variables.name: declarations.credits
variables.description: List of financial liabilities, credits, and loans
variables.notes_limitations: May contain multiple records separated by a newline
